title: plan cache can't work after update to v8.5.3
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ``` CREATE TABLE `table_A` ( `column_1` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `column_2` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `column_3` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `column_4` int(10) unsigned NOT NULL, `column_5` text COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci DEFAULT NULL, `column_6` datetime NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`column_1`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */, KEY `idx_4_6` (`column_4`, `column_6`), KEY `idx_4` (`column_4`), KEY `idx_6` (`column_6`), KEY `idx_4_3_2` (`column_4`, `column_3`, `column_2`), KEY `idx_3_2` (`column_3`, `column_2`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci; SET global tidb_opt_fix_control = "44830:ON"; SET tidb_opt_fix_control = "44830:ON"; SET GLOBAL tidb_enable_non_prepared_plan_cache=ON; SET tidb_enable_non_prepared_plan_cache=ON; SELECT `column_1`, `column_2`, `column_3`, `column_4`, `column_5`, `column_6` FROM `table_A` WHERE `column_3` = "M 5 9 2 9 2 5 4 6 8 4 9" AND ( `column_2` IN (1) OR `column_4` = 121092106 ) ORDER BY `column_6` DESC, `column_1` DESC LIMIT 1000; ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) ``` mysql> SELECT @@last_plan_from_cache; +------------------------+ | @@last_plan_from_cache | +------------------------+ | 1 | +------------------------+ 1 row in set (0.00 sec) ``` ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ``` mysql> SELECT @@last_plan_from_cache; +------------------------+ | @@last_plan_from_cache | +------------------------+ | 0 | +------------------------+ 1 row in set (0.00 sec) there is warning: ``` ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) 853 and master
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table_B ( id INTEGER NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2) NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW(), PRIMARY KEY (id) );
INSERT INTO table_B (name, value) VALUES ('Test A', 123.45);
INSERT INTO table_B (name, value) VALUES ('Test B', NULL);
SELECT * FROM table_B WHERE value IS NULL OR value > 100.00;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM table_B WHERE created_at >= TIMESTAMPADD(DAY, -1, NOW());
key_bug_features: Non-prepared plan cache not working after version update
